Mtn To Extend Jurisdiction Of Arbitrator Abramson
Off Calendar Nov-24-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Dennis Paredes, Don's Moving and Storage, LLC's Motion ot extend jurisdiction of the Arbitrator Abramson is scheduled this day. There being no appearance and no objection, the court's tentative ruling to grant plaintiff's motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Court ordered jurisdiction of the arbitrator is extended thru 12/13/04; compliance hearing is re-set to 1/6/05 at 1:30 pm, Dept. #212. Proceedings reported by: Yvonne Lee # 5616 (212)
